name: Peanut Butter Fudge (Austin)
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Chopped peanuts, or other nuts
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 2 pounds
DIRECTIONS: Mix well peanut butter, butter, corn syrup, vanilla extract, and salt. Gradually stir in sugar. Knead until smooth. Gradually add nuts. Pack into an 8x8x2 inches pan. When firm, cut into squares.
